initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this java resource_exhaustion fails: Java OOM heap space — increase max heap via JAVA_OPTS. Reproduce the failure with `javac MemoryExhaustion.java && JAVA_OPTS="-Xmx64m" java MemoryExhaustion`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.

success_criteria.fix_command_test: cd {workdir} && javac MemoryExhaustion.java && JAVA_OPTS="-Xmx64m" java MemoryExhaustion
